name: Georgia — PeachCourt
courtSystem: State and superior courts using PeachCourt
scopeNote: Georgia trial-court e-filing is split between eFileGA and PeachCourt. The published PeachCourt-facing spec found in this pass is thin: PDF-only and an approximately 25 MB total-size recommendation are verified; PDF/A, OCR, metadata, filename, and attachment-count rules are unverified.
guidanceNote: These checks are guidance only — not legal advice…tell us at support@macrify.me

applicability.note: Applies to Georgia courts using PeachCourt.

constraints.label: Recommended total upload size
constraints.note: The source recommends limiting total document size to 25 MB and does not break the figure into per-document versus per-envelope limits.

applicability.note: Applies to Georgia courts using PeachCourt.

pdfa.note: The PeachCourt source found in this pass says documents must be PDFs but does not mention PDF/A.

activeContent.note: The published PeachCourt-facing source found in this pass does not address active content.

encryption.note: The published PeachCourt-facing source found in this pass does not address encryption.

embeddedFiles.note: The published PeachCourt-facing source found in this pass does not address embedded files.

metadataScrub.note: The published PeachCourt-facing source found in this pass does not address descriptive metadata.

ocr.note: The published PeachCourt-facing source found in this pass does not address OCR or searchable text.

flattenForms.note: The published PeachCourt-facing source found in this pass does not address fillable-form flattening.
